original_statement: all songs are over 3:00 but which song?
mutated_statement: all items are over 3:00 but also under 2:00, but which item?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Contradictory numeric constraint addition: 'songs' → 'items' (specific entity generalized) | Added "also under 2:00", creating a logical contradiction with "over 3:00" | 'which song?' → 'which item?' (referent generalized) (all songs are over 3:00 but which song? → all items are over 3:00 but also under 2:00, but which item?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述“表格中唯一低于2:00的曲目是'intro'，其余均≥3:04”，可见agent直接在数据中找出满足“低于2:00”的项而未提及或纠正“所有项均>3:00且又<2:00”这一自相矛盾的指令。具体表现为：在执行链中未提出澄清或拒绝，而是机械地检索并返回符合单一约束（<2:00）的结果，未进行语义层面的矛盾识别或修正。因此将其归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾（形式化执行而非语义澄清）”。
